step_rationale: Adhesion molecule enriched in AMI extracellular vesicles; leukocyte recruitment.
mechanism: ALCAM on circulating vesicles enhances leukocyte–endothelial adhesion and platelet–leukocyte coupling in acute MI.

references.title: DSCAML1+ extracellular vesicles revealed by single-vesicle proteomics as a novel biomarker and therapeutic target in myocardial infarction.
